query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT ticker) as unique_tickers,
  COUNT(*) as total_prices,
  MIN(date) as earliest_date,
  MAX(date) as latest_date,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT ticker), 0) as avg_prices_per_ticker
FROM historical_prices;
